name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability, command, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the friction or gap you are experiencing.

## Proposed solution

What should Squire do differently? Be specific about the component type:

- [ ] New slash command
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New behavioral rule
- [ ] Improvement to existing component (specify: )
- [ ] Other:

## Is this grounded in real usage?

Describe the situation where you encountered this need. How often does it come up? Squire prioritizes corrections backed by observed patterns over theoretical improvements.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried or considered?
